EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IMSegmentation

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members for defining an M-based linear coordinate system on a polyline or polygon.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("FD5E17EC-D717-11D2-9F34-00C04F6BDF06")]
public interface IMSegmentation : IMCollection

Properties

MMax 

double MMax { get; }

Property Value

double

MMin 

double MMin { get; }

Property Value

double

MMonotonic

A value indicating whether Ms are monotonic, and if so, whether they are ascending or descending.

esriMMonotonicEnum MMonotonic { get; }

Property Value

esriMMonotonicEnum

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

CalculateNonSimpleMs()

Redefines the non-simple Ms to be values obtained from interpolation of surrounding defined Ms, or extrapolation of Ms.

void CalculateNonSimpleMs()

Examples

Sample Snippet

ExtrapolateMs(esriExtrapolationEnum, int, int, int, int)

Extrapolates the Ms at one or both ends of the geometry based on the M interval between the fromIndex and the toIndex.

void ExtrapolateMs(esriExtrapolationEnum extrapolationStyle, int fromPart, int FromPoint, int toPart, int ToPoint)

Parameters

extrapolationStyle esriExtrapolationEnum
fromPart int
FromPoint int
toPart int
ToPoint int

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetDistancesAtM(bool, double)

Returns an array of distances along the polyline at which is located the specified M. If the geometry's M's are monotonic along the geometry then the array will only have one element.

object GetDistancesAtM(bool asRatio, double M)

Parameters

asRatio bool
M double

Returns

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetMsAtDistance(double, bool)

Returns M values at the distance along the geometry. An array of one or two Ms is returned. Two Ms can be returned if the given distance is exactly at the beginning or ending of a part.

object GetMsAtDistance(double distance, bool asRatio)

Parameters

distance double
asRatio bool

Returns

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetPointsAtM(double, double)

Returns a multipoint geometry corresponding to the locations along the geometry where the specified M occurs.

IGeometryCollection GetPointsAtM(double M, double lateralOffset)

Parameters

M double
lateralOffset double

Returns

IGeometryCollection

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetSubcurveBetweenMs(double, double)

Returns a polyline geometry corresponding to the subcurve(s) between the fromM and the toM.

IGeometryCollection GetSubcurveBetweenMs(double fromM, double toM)

Parameters

fromM double
toM double

Returns

IGeometryCollection

Examples

Sample Snippet

InsertMAtDistance(double, double, bool, bool, out bool, out int, out int)

Sets the M value at the given distance along the geometry; creates a point at that distance if no point exists there.

void InsertMAtDistance(double M, double distance, bool asRatio, bool createPart, out bool SplitHappened, out int newPartIndex, out int newSegmentIndex)

Parameters

M double
distance double
asRatio bool
createPart bool
SplitHappened bool
newPartIndex int
newSegmentIndex int

Examples

Sample Snippet

InterpolateMsBetween(int, int, int, int)

Generates Ms by linear interpolation of segment distances for all vertices in the range [start+1, end-1].

void InterpolateMsBetween(int fromPart, int FromPoint, int toPart, int ToPoint)

Parameters

fromPart int
FromPoint int
toPart int
ToPoint int

Examples

Sample Snippet

MultiplyMs(double) 

void MultiplyMs(double factor)

Parameters

factor double

OffsetMs(double) 

void OffsetMs(double Offset)

Parameters

Offset double

ReverseMsOrder()

Reverses the order of the Ms along the geometry.

void ReverseMsOrder()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetAndInterpolateMsBetween(double, double)

Sets the Ms at the beginning and the end of the geometry and interpolates the M values between these values.

void SetAndInterpolateMsBetween(double fromM, double toM)

Parameters

fromM double
toM double

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetMsAsDistance(bool)

Sets the M values to the cumulative length from the origin of the geometry.

void SetMsAsDistance(bool asRatio)

Parameters

asRatio bool
